focus_points.label: What 'good' means for Carlos right now.
focus_points.reason: What Carlos defines as good work right now, so feedback can be concrete instead of subjective.

focus_points.label: Quality bar — turning feedback into behavior.
focus_points.reason: Whether prior feedback translated into specific behavior changes, or stayed abstract, so you can calibrate the quality bar with examples.

focus_points.label: Where Carlos feels blocked in growth.
focus_points.reason: Where Carlos feels blocked in growth, so you can pick a near-term practice that removes the bottleneck.

focus_points.label: Feedback landing — both directions.
focus_points.reason: How feedback has been landing for him, and what kind of feedback he wants more of, so the next cycle is easier to act on.
